_authoring_notes: Velocity Section 1: Hero. Cloned from LLSS 01-hero.json on 2026-04-27 per Phase 3 plan.
Element IDs use velocity-* prefix to avoid collisions if exported as saved templates.
2026-04-30 hero image populated. Asset: Media Library attachment 5143 (Velocity_Conference_2026_Hero_1900-x-600.jpg), 1900x600 JPG, 264 KB, properly registered.

2026-04-30 PM TEMPLATE A REVISION (refined per Jonathan 2026-04-30): Hero is IMAGE-ONLY. No visible H1, no date strap, no tagline, NO navy overlay. The artwork carries the complete identity (Velocity wordmark + 'May 20-21, 2026 · The Westin, New Orleans' date + 'A FORCE Conference' subtitle + 'BUILD MOMENTUM TOGETHER IN THE BIG EASY' tagline are all baked into the image). Anything overlaid was redundant noise.
SR-ONLY H1 retained for SEO/screen readers via inline-styled sr-only HTML widget (position:absolute off-screen). Page semantics intact; visual is image-only.
Overlay REMOVED entirely (was 0.85 then 0.5). The image was designed without an overlay in mind.
Practical info (date, location, register CTA) moved to a 3-column info bar in Section 01b directly below the hero. Order: WHEN | REGISTER | WHERE.
This Template A revision SHOULD propagate to LLSS, Government Forum, and FSC event pages for visual consistency. Pending Jonathan approval to apply to LLSS next session.

settings._NOTE: Overlay REMOVED entirely 2026-04-30 PM (was 0.85 navy, then 0.5 navy). Image is shown as designed.
